allow: Bash(ls /Applications/ 2>/dev/null | grep -iE 'chrome|chromium|brave|edge|firefox' ; echo "---"; ls "/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome" 2>/dev/null && echo "CHROME FOUND")
